title: await should only be used with promises
description: Promises are objects that represent the eventual completion or failure of an asynchronous operation. They provide a way to handle asynchronous operations in a more organized and manageable manner. To use await, you need to ensure that you are calling a function or an expression that returns a promise.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: await should only be used with promises, not with literal values.
